commands.repair_reason: trusted ClawSweeper review contains P-severity findings (sha=35de287761b1d50556302d408aed8b726712290b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR guards the Control UI chat session picker blur handler so empty search blur does not clear the picker result, and adds a regression test for option clickability after that blur.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +51. Total +55 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The issue steps and before video show the empty-focused search input blur/click race, and current main source still has the unconditional blur handler that triggers the destructive empty-query clear path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; this automerge-opted replacement has no blocking findings and should be handled by the normal CI and mergeability gates.

target.title: fix(ui): preserve session picker on empty search blur
